tasks.task: Failure-mode narrative: list top 10 largest absolute-error days with date and weather context, group into at least three error archetypes, and provide one remediation per archetype.
tasks.expected_output: Top-error day audit with archetypes and remediations
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if top-error list is missing, if fewer than three archetypes are defined, or if remediations are not archetype-specific.

single.result_excerpt: ## Failure-Mode Narrative: Top 10 Largest Absolute-Error Days I've completed the analysis of prediction failures in the bike-sharing dataset. Here are the key findings: ### Top 10 Largest Error Days (Summary) | Date | Actual | Predicted | Error | Weather | Context | |------|--------|-----------|-------|---------|---------| | 2012-10-29 | 22 | 4,949 | -4,927 | Light Rain/Snow | Extreme weather suppression | | 2012-03-17 | 7,836 | 2,992 | +4,844 | Mist/Cloudy | Weekend surge | | 2011-08-27 | 1,115
